probes.name: referrals-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms every migration this module ships has run: referral_programs, referral_codes, referrals, referral_rewards, referral_fraud_flags, plus their composite unique indexes.

probes.name: referrals-unique-indexes-present
probes.description: Confirms the composite unique indexes exist: (tenant_id, referral_program_id, referrer_id, referred_id) partial WHERE deleted_at IS NULL on referrals; (referral_id, recipient_role) partial WHERE deleted_at IS NULL on referral_rewards; (tenant_id, code) partial WHERE deleted_at IS NULL on referral_codes. Missing any index risks double-referral / double-materialization races.

probes.name: referrals-attribution-module-reachable
probes.description: Confirms growth::attribution's AttributionSnapshotBuilder is resolvable from the container. This module cannot function without the upstream attribution feeder.

probes.name: referrals-vesting-queue-backlog
probes.description: Warns when > 500 rows in referrals are stuck in status='vesting' with vesting_completes_at past-due for > 24h. Indicates CheckReferralVestingJob has stalled.

probes.name: referrals-materialization-backlog
probes.description: Warns when > 200 rows in referral_rewards are stuck in status='vested' for > 2h. Indicates MaterializeVestedRewardsJob has stalled OR Finance module is refusing.

probes.name: referrals-fraud-open-flags
probes.description: Warns when > 100 fraud flags across the platform are unreviewed for > 7 days. Indicates fraud-review workflow is stalled — tenants aren't reviewing their flags.

probes.name: referrals-atomicity-counter-clean
probes.description: Reads stackra.referrals.atomicity.failures_total counter. Any non-zero value in the last 24h is a P1 signal — the vested-transition + reward creation transaction failed somewhere.

probes.name: referrals-double-materialization-clean
probes.description: Reads stackra.referrals.rewards.double_materialization_attempts_total counter. Any non-zero value indicates a race the observer's unique index should have prevented — P1 signal.

probes.name: referrals-budget-cap-not-blown
probes.description: Warns when any program has rewards_issued_amount_cents > 1.05 * max_rewards_per_program (>5% overrun of the configured cap). Indicates a race that got past the observer's gate.

probes.name: referrals-invitation-suppression-recent
probes.description: Confirms the invitation-suppression cache is warm + refresh runs. Stale cache leaks unsubscribes past the CAN-SPAM window.

probes.name: referrals-reconcile-recent
probes.description: Confirms ReconcileProgramBudgetJob completed within the last 25 hours (nightly cadence + 1h slop). Stale reconciler indicates scheduler drift.
